evidence_summary: The scene must capture the transition from active combat to a grim, ritualistic conclusion. As the Zodangan fleet is broken, the focus shifts from the mechanics of battle to the psychological horror of the commanders choosing mass suicide over surrender. Th...
The battle concludes as the Zodangan fleet is broken. In a display of ritualistic honor/despair, the Zodangan commanders leap from their vessels to their deaths rather than face capture or defeat.
